title: bigelowia nudata var. virgata
intro: Bigelowia nudata var. virgata, also known as Bigelow's yarrow or Mountain yarrow, is a plant species within the sunflower family, native to the western United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers, due to its ability to soothe the digestive system. Bigelowia nudata var. virgata is used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to promote relaxation and alleviate various health concerns.
